'''Ro Fenn''' was a corpulent white [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a member of the [[Twi'lek Ruling Council]] of [[Lessu City/Legends|Lessu]] in [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]]. He was the head of [[Clan Fenn]].

==Biography==
Fenn exiled his son, [[Kh'aris Fenn|Kh'aris]], from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] for committing horrible crimes—which in reality, he himself committed. Although he assured Kh'aris that his exile would be short, it lasted many years, until with the help of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], Kh'aris returned to Ryloth to assume control of the planet. However, his scheme was foiled and [[Lon Secura]] convinced the Council to exile Fenn into the [[Bright Lands]] to be [[Death/Legends|killed]].
